title: 2008年12月大学英语六级真题(第1套)

sections.title: Part I Writing
sections.directions: Directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write a short essay entitled How To Improve Student's Mental Health?. You should write at least 150 words following the outline given below. 1.大学生的心理健康十分重要 2.因此，学校可以…… 3.我们自己应当…… How To Improve Student's Mental Health?

sections.title: Part IV Translation
sections.source: 82. He designed the first suspension bridge, which_______________________(把美观与功能完美地结合起来)。83．It was very dark, but Mary seemed to __________________________________ (本能地知道该走哪条路)84. I don’t think it advisable that parents__________________________ (剥夺孩子们的自由) to（与不那么活跃的人相比死亡率要低）。（为什么你是某个特定职位的最佳人选）。范文：professional way, which means they have more or better opportunities to save us than others. (学校)there is little doubt that further attention will be paid to the issue.（我们）快速阅读：听力仔细阅读完形翻译
